## AlternationNode class

An AST node that matches one of several alternative patterns.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare class AlternationNode extends RegexNode 
```
**Extends:** [RegexNode](./pattern-builder.regexnode.md)

## Example


```ts
new AlternationNode([new TextNode("yes"), new TextNode("no")]).toString();
// "(?:yes|no)"
```
